items.ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
items.title: From Margins to Mainstream
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau PIB Headquarters From Margins to Mainstream How SMILE Is Transforming Lives Across India Posted On: 20 APR 2026 10:53AM by PIB Delhi Key Takeaways For 2021-2026, ₹390 crore was allotted by the government for the SMILE scheme. 31,055 individuals identified and 9,935 rehabilitated under the beggary sub-scheme as on March 2026, reflecting on-ground implementation at scale. 2…
